_note: Mock example only. Not generated from production data. Field names are illustrative and do not reflect the actual private schema.
_purpose: Show the shape of an agent definition, including its per-agent autonomy level. Autonomy level controls how often the agent pauses to confirm — it does NOT change what the agent is permitted to do; the capability tiers and policy gate still bound it. See docs/how-it-works.md.
name: Meeting Notes Summarizer
goal: Summarize the morning's meeting notes into a report deliverable.
_autonomy_note: confirm_summary = acts after the owner approves a plan summary. Even at 'auto', SENSITIVE/FORBIDDEN capabilities remain governed by the policy gate.
